name: Dan's Favorite Chicken Recipe
recipeIngredient: Chicken Cut Up - About 2 Pounds Worth
recipeInstructions:
1. If needed, cut the chicken into pieces.
2. Place the chicken pieces into the crock pot.
3. Pour the spaghetti sauce over the chicken.
4. Sprinkle dried oregano and garlic salt (or your preferred seasonings) over the chicken and sauce.
5. Cover with the lid and cook on LOW for a full working day.
6. Prepare rice, pasta, salad, and French bread to serve alongside the chicken.
7. Carefully remove the cooked chicken from the crock pot onto a serving platter (it will be tender).
8. Transfer any remaining sauce into a gravy boat or serving dish.
